BOUAMAMA Salim
BOUAMAMA Salim
Grade:Professeur
Grade:Professeur
Email:salim.bouamama@univ-setif.dz

Département:Informatique
Bureau:
Bureau:

Salim Bouamama is a professor in the Department of Computer Science at Ferhat Abbas University Sétif 1, Algeria. He earned his M.Sc. in Computer Science from the Jordan University of Science and Technology and completed his Ph.D. in 2013 at Ferhat Abbas University Sétif 1, under the supervision of Prof. Christian Blum and Prof. Abdallah Boukerram.Currently, he serves as a teacher-researcher in the Department of Computer Science at Ferhat Abbas University Sétif 1. He is also a member of the Mechatronics Laboratory (LMETR - E1764200), part of the Optics and Precision Mechanics Institute at the same university. Prior to his current role, he worked at the Department of Computer Science at the University of M’sila from October 2006 to October 2017. His research interests lie in combinatorial optimization problems, metaheuristics, intelligent systems, and network optimization.
